title: Remedium Remedy
description: Allows easy access to the nether ceiling by adding a "very simple" way to mine bedrock!
body:
Ever wanted to get onto the nether roof without complex machines and relocation orbs?
Well now you can with remedium!

Remedium is a new material which is better than netherite. It has special properties when combined with netherstars but you'll need power templates to power them up. Thanks to the power of boredom you can also make armor with it made in the same way you make netherite but using netherite inplace of diamond armor. but you'll need a special upgrade template that rarely spawns in ancient citys.

By default the pickaxe cant break the bottom most bedrock of the overworld and nether to prevent someone from making random void holes but you can enable this with the creatively named game rule chargedRemediumCanMineVoidBedrock or completely disable bedrock breaking with remediumCanMineBedrock.

I got the idea for this mod when playing with friends and one of them wanted to go to the nether ceiling. I wasnt sure mainly because I didnt know if anything built up there would save. But from testing though it does!
